column1: # Knights of Camelot - monster loot tables
# Rows keyed by DropType enum (see src/entity.h). For each depth band a
# monster's DropType lookup yields gold/item ranges.
# drop_type: none | gold | gold_large | item_weapon | item_armor | item_potion | item_food
# depth_min/max: dungeon level range this row applies to (inclusive). 0/0 = any.
# item_chance: % chance a themed item also drops (0-100)
# rare_chance: % chance the item drop is rolled twice (best kept)
